title: tanacetum achilleoides
intro: Tanacetum achilleoides, also known as Achillea millefolium's close relative, is a perennial herb belonging to the Asteraceae family. It has been used for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antiviral properties, which have been utilized in treating various health conditions. The health benefits of Tanacetum achilleoides include reducing menstrual cramps, improving digestion, and acting as a natural antihistamine to alleviate allergy symptoms. Tanacetum achilleoides is often prepared as a tea, infusion, or tincture, and its leaves, flowers, and roots can be used in herbal preparations, although more research is needed to confirm its efficacy and optimal dosage.
